targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    workspace_sid,
    task_queue_sid,

    -- Queue-level aggregates: sum across all channels (rollup)
    sum(pending_count) AS queue_pending_tasks,
    sum(reserved_count) AS queue_reserved_tasks,
    sum(assigned_count) AS queue_assigned_tasks,
    sum(wrapping_count) AS queue_wrapping_tasks,
    sum(waiting_count) AS queue_waiting_tasks,
    sum(active_count) AS queue_active_tasks,
    sum(pending_count + reserved_count + assigned_count + wrapping_count) AS queue_total_tasks,

    -- Channel breakdown: collect channel stats into array
    groupArray((
        task_channel_sid,
        pending_count,
        reserved_count,
        assigned_count,
        wrapping_count,
        waiting_count,
        active_count
    )) AS channel_stats,

    -- Longest waiting task across all channels
    COALESCE(argMax(longest_waiting_task_sid, longest_waiting_entered_date), '') AS longest_waiting_task_sid,
    COALESCE(max(longest_waiting_entered_date), toDateTime('1970-01-01')) AS longest_waiting_task_from,

    now() AS event_timestamp

FROM (
    -- Channel-level aggregation: aggregate tasks by channel
    SELECT
        workspace_sid,
        task_queue_sid,
        task_channel_sid,
        countIf(latest_status = 'pending') AS pending_count,
        countIf(latest_status = 'reserved') AS reserved_count,
        countIf(latest_status = 'assigned') AS assigned_count,
        countIf(latest_status = 'wrapping') AS wrapping_count,
        countIf(latest_status IN ('pending', 'reserved')) AS waiting_count,
        countIf(latest_status IN ('assigned', 'wrapping')) AS active_count,
        argMaxIf(task_sid, task_queue_entered_date, latest_status IN ('pending', 'reserved')) AS longest_waiting_task_sid,
        maxIf(task_queue_entered_date, latest_status IN ('pending', 'reserved')) AS longest_waiting_entered_date
    FROM (
        -- Task-level: get LATEST status per task (argMax fix)
        SELECT
            COALESCE(workspace_sid, '') AS workspace_sid,
            COALESCE(task_queue_sid, '') AS task_queue_sid,
            COALESCE(task_channel_sid, '') AS task_channel_sid,
            task_sid,
            argMax(task_assignment_status, timestamp) AS latest_status,
            argMax(task_queue_entered_date, timestamp) AS task_queue_entered_date
        FROM wds_events
        WHERE workspace_sid != '' AND task_queue_sid != ''
        GROUP BY workspace_sid, task_queue_sid, task_channel_sid, task_sid
    )
    GROUP BY workspace_sid, task_queue_sid, task_channel_sid
)
GROUP BY workspace_sid, task_queue_sid;
